ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the customer is located */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "stock_code" INTEGER /* Stock code of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "invoice_no" INTEGER /* Invoice number for the order */,
  "total_quantity" INTEGER /* Total quantity of products in the order */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., 'pending', 'shipped', 'delivered') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the order item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order item */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product in the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the inventory */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point for the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., 'sales', 'customer service', 'manager') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_roles" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "role_id")
)
column_names: ID of the country where the customer is located
ID of the customer who placed the order
Total quantity of products in the order
Unique identifier for each order item
ID of the order the item belongs to
ID of the product in the order item
